Vectis Mail
Features Pricing Docs About Contact

Your email server.
Your rules.

Vectis Mail is a containerised, self-hosted email platform with a sending API, admin dashboard, and enterprise features. Deploy a production mail server in minutes, not days.

Get Started Read the Docs

Everything you need for production email

Postfix, Dovecot, Rspamd, DKIM, SPF, DMARC — configured and managed through a single YAML file.

Declarative Configuration

One config.yaml defines your entire mail stack. Change a setting, run apply, and Vectis generates Postfix, Dovecot, Rspamd, and Traefik configs automatically.

Sending API

REST API for transactional email. Single and batch sending, domain-scoped API keys, webhook callbacks for delivery status. Drop-in replacement for external email services.

Admin Dashboard

Full web UI for domains, mailboxes, aliases, deliverability, audit logs, backups, and system updates. Role-based access control with TOTP MFA and OIDC SSO.

Inbound Webhooks

Receive email programmatically. Vectis parses inbound messages and POSTs the full content — body, attachments, headers, envelope — to your application via HMAC-signed webhooks.

Automatic TLS

Let's Encrypt certificates provisioned and renewed automatically via acme.sh. Supports Cloudflare DNS-01 challenges. TLS 1.2+ enforced on all protocols.

Built-in Observability

Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, Loki log aggregation, per-domain analytics, IP warmup tracking, and RBL monitoring — all included.

Atomic Updates

The orchestrator manages updates with a 6-phase pipeline: snapshot, migrate, pull, deploy, health check, complete. Automatic rollback on failure.

Webmail Included

Roundcube webmail with ManageSieve filter rules, mobile-responsive Elastic skin, and Vectis branding. Your users get a familiar email experience out of the box.

Clustering & HA

Multi-node clustering with leader election, rolling updates, PgBouncer connection pooling, and cross-node health checking for high-availability deployments.

Trusted by the Veltara Works ecosystem

Vectis Mail powers transactional email for ValidonX and other Veltara Works products.
